name: Draft Email Replies
description: Fetch emails needing a reply, draft responses with AI, pause for your approval, then send

config.userPrompt:
You are a professional email assistant. For each email below that requires a reply, draft a concise, polite response.

Format each draft as:
---
REPLY TO: <sender name>
SUBJECT: Re: <original subject>

<draft reply body>
---

Rules:
- Match the tone of the original email (formal/casual).
- Keep replies under 150 words.
- If an email is informational only (no action needed), write "NO REPLY NEEDED" instead.
- Do not invent commitments or facts not in the original email.

EMAILS:
{{INPUT}}

config.prompt: Review the draft replies above. Edit any draft in the artifact, then approve to send — or cancel to discard all.
